Reading: State
Good
Recovery 64 • Sleep 76 • Strain 10%

Read
The first logged intake opens the day’s runway, but it is still mostly energy with protein barely begun. Recovery is supportive and output is running lighter than usual, so the state favors measured catch-up and muscle-preserving balance over intensity.

Wide runway, steady state.
